subject: Add missing readiness vars to portal-mariadb chart
commit_message:
Add missing readiness vars to portal-mariadb chart

Change-Id: I219df0e6d67fb9bd35bbc6f00addf01f9e51fcc8
Issue-ID: OOM-908
Signed-off-by: Frank A. Zdarsky <fzdarsky@redhat.com>

entries.message:
Abandoned

You may want to allow images to come from different repos, e.g., the readiness-check coming from nexus3.onap.org vs mariadb coming from an ONAP-external repo.

Nit: It'd make sense to avoid names of specific repos (e.g. DockerHub) in the naming of variables.

By coincidence, I also tried to address this today (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/42263/), so we can probably abandon my patch.
